2605.06607.title: AI CFD Scientist: Toward Open-Ended Computational Fluid Dynamics Discovery with Physics-Aware AI Agents
2605.06607.paper_summary: Recent LLM-based agents have closed substantial portions of the scientific discovery loop in software-only machine-learning research, in chemistry, and in biology. Extending the same loop to high-fidelity physical simulators is harder, because solver completion does not imply physical validity and many failure modes appear only in field-level imagery rather than in solver logs. We present AI CFD Scientist, an open-source AI scientist for computational fluid dynamics (CFD) that, to our knowledge, is the first to span literature-grounded ideation, validated execution, vision-based physics verification, source-code modification, and figure-grounded writing within a single inspectable workflow. Three coupled pathways cover parameter sweeps within a fixed solver, case-local C++ library compilation for new physical models, and open-ended hypothesis search against a reference comparator, all running on OpenFOAM through Foam-Agent. At the center of the framework is a vision-language physics-verification gate that inspects rendered flow fields before any result is accepted, rerun, or written into a manuscript. On five tasks under a shared GPT-5.5 backbone, AI CFD Scientist autonomously discovers a Spalart-Allmaras runtime correction that reduces lower-wall Cf RMSE against DNS by 7.89% on the periodic hill at Reh=5600; under matched LLM cost, two strong general AI-scientist baselines (ARIS, DeepScientist) execute partial CFD workflows but lack the domain-specific validity gates needed to convert runs into defensible scientific claims; and a controlled planted-failure ablation shows that the vision-language gate detects 14 of 16 silent failures missed by solver-level checks. Code, prompts, and run artifacts are released at https://github.com/csml-rpi/cfd-scientist.
2605.06607.paper_summary_zh: 最近基於大型語言模型（LLM）的代理已經在僅使用軟體的機器學習研究、化學和生物學中關閉了科學發現循環的相當大部分。將相同的循環擴展到高保真物理模擬器更具挑戰性，因為求解器的完成並不意味著物理有效性，許多失敗模式僅在現場影像中出現，而不是在求解器日誌中。我們提出了AI CFD Scientist，一個開源的計算流體動力學（CFD）AI科學家，據我們所知，這是第一個在單一可檢查的工作流程中涵蓋文獻基礎的構思、經過驗證的執行、基於視覺的物理驗證、源代碼修改和圖形基礎的寫作。三條耦合路徑涵蓋了在固定求解器內的參數掃描、新物理模型的案例本地C++庫編譯，以及針對參考比較器的開放式假設搜索，所有這些都通過Foam-Agent在OpenFOAM上運行。該框架的核心是一個視覺-語言物理驗證閘，該閘在接受任何結果之前檢查渲染的流場，重新運行或寫入手稿。在五個任務下，基於共享的GPT-5.5骨幹，AI CFD Scientist自主發現了一個Spalart-Allmaras運行時修正，該修正在Reh=5600的周期性山丘上將下壁Cf RMSE降低了7.89%；在匹配的LLM成本下，兩個強大的通用AI科學家基準（ARIS、DeepScientist）執行部分CFD工作流程，但缺乏將運行轉換為可辯護科學主張所需的領域特定有效性閘；而一項控制的植入失敗消融顯示，視覺-語言閘檢測到了16個靜默失敗中的14個，這些失敗被求解器級檢查漏掉了。代碼、提示和運行工件已在https://github.com/csml-rpi/cfd-scientist發布。
2605.06607.author: Nithin Somasekharan et.al.
2605.06607.authors: Nithin Somasekharan, Rabi Pathak, Manushri Dhanakoti, Tingwen Zhang, Ling Yue, Andy Zhu, Shaowu Pan
